zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery FitzHugh於1425年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親William FitzHugh27歲，母親Lady Margaret Willoughby31歲。她於1454年與Sir John Melton在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1512年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾科比享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery FitzHugh was born in 1425, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William FitzHugh, was 27 and her mother, Lady Margaret Willoughby, was 31. She married Sir John Melton in 1454, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1512, in Kirby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

ko.Stanton Saint John, Oxfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Margery FitzHugh(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzHugh(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Willoughby(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1454년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir John Melton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 커비에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Stanton Saint John, Oxfordshire, England: стантон ст джон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery FitzHugh родилась в 1425 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William FitzHugh было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Willoughby, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Melton в 1454 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1512 г. в местности кирби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery FitzHugh nació en 1425, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William FitzHugh, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Melton en 1454, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1512, en Kirby, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
